column5: Epic Games Store 0% fee on first $1M per game per year (vs 15% Apple). 12% after threshold. EGS Webshops launching for out-of-app purchases - bypasses 30% app store tax entirely
column12: Game-changing for app monetization. Web payments bypass 30% store tax. Epic spent $1B+ fighting Apple/Google for this.
column15: Use Epic Games Store for games OR build web payment flows to bypass app store fees. 0% on first $1M is massive for indie devs.

column5: Tim Sweeney: Revenue shifting away from useless gatekeepers and middlemen. Flat fees tied to real services (hundreds of dollars for app reviews) vs percentage-based revenue share. International courts may ban revenue-based app fees.
column12: Strategic insight on where app monetization heading. Build for web-first payments now before regulations force change.
column15: Position for web-to-app funnels now. Regulatory tailwinds coming.
